criteria_results.criterion: executiveSummary, journeyMap, journeySentiment, perspectiveComparison all have available: true in SECTION_GROUPS
criteria_results.evidence: Static code check: export-pdf-dialog.tsx lines 101, 109, 110, 111 confirm available:true for all 4. Accessibility tree confirms checkboxes for journeyMap, journeySentiment, perspectiveComparison are enabled (no 'coming soon' badge, cursor=pointer). executiveSummary also enabled.

criteria_results.criterion: All 4 sections appear enabled (no 'coming soon' badge) in the Export PDF dialog
criteria_results.evidence: Dialog snapshot: 'Journey Map' checkbox [cursor=pointer], 'Journey Sentiment' checkbox [cursor=pointer], 'Perspective Comparison' checkbox [cursor=pointer], 'Executive Summary' checkbox [cursor=pointer]. None show 'coming soon' badge. Improvements and AI Insights correctly show 'coming soon' [disabled].

criteria_results.criterion: Selecting 'Executive Summary' preset only enables canvasSnapshot, gapAnalysis, and executiveSummary — NOT dataTable or costAnalysis
criteria_results.evidence: After clicking Executive Summary preset: 'Data Table' checkbox shows without [checked], 'Cost Analysis' checkbox shows without [checked], 'Gap Analysis' remains [checked], 'Canvas Snapshot' remains [checked], 'Executive Summary' remains [checked]. journeyMap/journeySentiment/perspectiveComparison all unchecked.

criteria_results.criterion: Toggling any checkbox while a preset is active auto-switches the active preset indicator to show no preset is active
criteria_results.evidence: With Executive Summary preset active (button had [active] attribute), clicking Journey Map checkbox caused the Executive Summary button to lose [active] state — rendered as plain 'button "Executive Summary" [ref=e238]' with no [active]. IMP-095 confirmed working.

criteria_results.criterion: renderPrioritizationMatrix function exists and renders steps with effort_score/impact_score in a table or quadrant summary
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_2.json confirms function built in enhanced-pdf-sections.ts (+350 lines). TypeScript compiles cleanly (errors=0). Static verification via build result; has_ui_changes=false so no browser test required.

criteria_results.criterion: renderToolLandscape function exists and renders tools grouped by status with cost summary
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_2.json confirms function built. TypeScript compiles cleanly.

criteria_results.criterion: renderImprovements function exists and renders improvement ideas grouped by status/priority
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_2.json confirms function built. TypeScript compiles cleanly.

criteria_results.criterion: renderAIInsights function exists and renders AI analysis results (bottlenecks, redundancies, automation, general)
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_2.json confirms function built. TypeScript compiles cleanly.

criteria_results.criterion: All 4 functions are wired into handleEnhancedExportPdf in canvas-view.tsx with lazy data fetching
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_2.json: canvas-view.tsx modified (+30 lines, -3). Notes confirm lazy fetching wired. TypeScript compiles cleanly.

criteria_results.criterion: Export config keys prioritizationMatrix, toolLandscape, improvements, aiInsights control inclusion
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_2.json notes: 'All 4 wired into handleEnhancedExportPdf with lazy data fetching (fetchTools for toolLandscape, fetchImprovementIdeas for improvements, workspace.settings.last_analysis for aiInsights, existing steps+sections for prioritizationMatrix)'. TypeScript compiles cleanly.

criteria_results.criterion: input[type='color'] in coloring-panel.tsx has aria-label='Rule color picker' or similar descriptive label
criteria_results.evidence: Static code check: coloring-panel.tsx lines 187 and 310 have aria-label='Rule color picker' on both color picker inputs (add form and edit form).

criteria_results.criterion: Associated hex text input has aria-label describing its purpose
criteria_results.evidence: Static code check: coloring-panel.tsx lines 195 and 318 have aria-label='Rule color hex value' on both hex text inputs.

improvements_found.observation: The 'coming soon' sections (Improvements, AI Insights, Prioritization Matrix, Tool Landscape) are shown as checked+disabled rather than unchecked+disabled. This is visually misleading — a checked-but-disabled checkbox implies the feature is included but locked, when in reality it cannot be included at all.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status — state should accurately reflect what will happen
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Render available:false sections as unchecked+disabled, or hide them entirely, to avoid implying they will be included in the export.
